Uses of Class
it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.Photo

  • Uses of TdApi.Photo in it.tdlight.jni

    Fields in it.tdlight.jni declared as TdApi.Photo
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.PageBlockEmbeddedPost.authorPhoto
    Post author photo; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.Game.photo
    Game photo.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.InlineQueryResultPhoto.photo
    Photo.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.MessageInvoice.photo
    Product photo; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.MessagePhoto.photo
    The photo description.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.PageBlockPhoto.photo
    Photo file; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.PageBlockRelatedArticle.photo
    Article photo; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.PushMessageContentPhoto.photo
    Message content; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.WebPage.photo
    Image representing the content; may be null.
    TdApi.Photo TdApi.PageBlockEmbedded.posterPhoto
    Poster photo, if available; may be null.
    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.Photo
    Constructor Description
    Game​(long id, String shortName, String title, TdApi.FormattedText text, String description, TdApi.Photo photo, TdApi.Animation animation)
    Describes a game.

    Represents a photo.

    A message with an invoice from a bot.
    MessagePhoto​(TdApi.Photo photo, TdApi.FormattedText caption, boolean isSecret)
    A photo message.

    A photo.

    Contains information about a related article.
    PushMessageContentPhoto​(TdApi.Photo photo, String caption, boolean isSecret, boolean isPinned)
    A photo message.
    WebPage​(String url, String displayUrl, String type, String siteName, String title, TdApi.FormattedText description, TdApi.Photo photo, String embedUrl, String embedType, int embedWidth, int embedHeight, int duration, String author, TdApi.Animation animation, TdApi.Audio audio, TdApi.Document document, TdApi.Sticker sticker, TdApi.Video video, TdApi.VideoNote videoNote, TdApi.VoiceNote voiceNote, int instantViewVersion)
